use_cases: Form submission and user input triggering in web applications
Navigation and action buttons in dashboards and admin interfaces
Call-to-action buttons in marketing and landing pages
Interactive controls in modal dialogs and overlays
Standardized button styling across design systems
ai_summary: A reusable React Button component using Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible variant and size management. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) with proper accessibility focus states. Built with Tailwind CSS and follows standard button patterns for form controls and interactive UI elements.
